The text states "most lightning flashes take place inside a cloud, and only a few can be seen jumping between two clouds..." So B is incorrect because "usually" implies more than inside clouds. C) Lightning travels 5 times faster than thunder. The passage mentions the 5 seconds for sound to travel a mile, but it's comparing the speed of light (lightning) and sound (thunder). The exact speed ratio isn't given, but since light is almost instantaneous and sound takes 5 seconds per mile, the speed difference is much more than 5 times.
